title: hordeum lanuginosum
intro: Hordeum lanuginosum, also known as bearded spelt or downy spelt, is a species of flowering plant in the grass family Poaceae. It is a type of wild grass with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant is valued for its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce inflammation, and alleviate digestive issues due to its high fiber content. Hordeum lanuginosum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal supplements and food products.
